ecarx.carext.connect.oncall

Interface Call


  • public interface Call
    Represents a call.
    Since:
    4

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  Call.Status
      Call status.
      static interface  Call.Type
      Call type.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int STATUS_CALL_ANSWER_TIMEOUT
      The state of a call when answer timeout.
      static int STATUS_CALL_OUT_TIMEOUT
      The state of a call when call out timeout.
      static int STATUS_CALL_REJECT_TIMEOUT
      The state of a call when call reject timeout.
      static int STATUS_CONNECTED
      The state of a call when CONNECTED normally.
      static int STATUS_CONNECTING
      The state of a call when the user has initiated a disconnection of the call, but the call has not yet been disconnected.
      static int STATUS_DATA_SENDING
      The state of a call when data sending.
      static int STATUS_ENDED
      The state of a call when ended abnormally.
      static int STATUS_FAILED
      The state of a call when actively supporting conversation.
      static int STATUS_FAILED_CALLBACKMODE
      The state of a call when ended abnormally in callbackmode.
      static int STATUS_INCOMING
      The state of an outgoing call when newly created.
      static int STATUS_RECONNECITON
      The state of an outgoing call when dialing the call center, but not yet connected.
      static int STATUS_STARTING
      The state of an incoming call when ringing locally, but not yet connected.
      static int TYPE_BCALL
      Brakedown call.
      static int TYPE_ECALL
      Emergency call.
      static int TYPE_ICALL
      Information call.
      static int TYPE_UNKNOWN
      Unknown type.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      long getConnectTimeMillis()
      Returns the time of the call connected.
      int getStatus()
      Get current status of the call.
      int getType()
      Get type of the call.
      boolean isCallBackMode()
      The call is in call back mode or not.

      • getType

        Get current status of the call.

      • getConnectTimeMillis

        long getConnectTimeMillis()
        Returns the time of the call connected.
        Returns:
        The time the call connected in milliseconds since the epoch.
        Since:
        4

      • isCallBackMode

        boolean isCallBackMode()
        The call is in call back mode or not.
        Returns:
        true indicates in call back mode.
        Since:
        4
